Also hosts financial literacy workshops for youth and their families to help make informed decisions, strengthen economic stability, and workshops for individuals who want to start a business or improve existing business. 300 S Roosevelt Drive Suite #5 Seaside, OR 97138 Eligibility: Latinx/Hispanic community members or Spanish language speakers Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5:30pm Email (971) 414-7270 Get Directions Visit Website More Details METROPOLITAN FAMILY SERVICE MFS CASH BEAVERTON IN PERSON TAX ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides federal and Oregon tax preparation through in-person appointments. IRS-certified volunteers prepare most individual tax returns and limited self-employment returns. Includes help with applying for or renewing an Individual Taxpayer Identification Number (ITIN) and information about available tax credits. Accepts volunteers for client facilitators, interpreters, outreach committee members, and tax preparers. 8285 SW Nimbus Avenue Suite 140 Beaverton, OR 97008 Eligibility: Household income at or below $69,000 None of the following: Rental property, sale of cryptocurrency, or adjustments on education expenses (box 4 or 6 on 1098-T) Self employment income with any of the following: Over $50,000 in expenses, a loss for the year, employees, business use of the home, depreciation or amortization Hours: Open Wednesday noon-8pm and Thursday 10am-6pm and Friday-Sunday 9am-5pm January 24, 2026-April 15, 2026 Email Get Directions Visit Website More Details METROPOLITAN FAMILY SERVICE MFS CASH BETHEL LUTHERAN IN PERSON TAX ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides federal and Oregon tax preparation through in-person appointments.
